Interface ImageRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Image,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Image,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Image,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Image,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Image,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Image>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Image,UUID>
@Repository public interface ImageRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Image,UUID>

  • Method Details

    • countByCreatorId

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(i) FROM Image i WHERE i.creator.id = :creatorId AND i.isDeleted = false") Long countByCreatorId(@Param("creatorId") UUID creatorId)

    • findImageById

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.id = :id AND i.isDeleted = false") Image findImageById(@Param("id") UUID id)

    • findByCreatorIdAndIsPublic

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.creator.id = :creatorId AND i.isPublic = true AND i.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findByCreatorIdAndIsPublic(@Param("creatorId") UUID creatorId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findAllByCreatorId

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.creator.id = :creatorId AND i.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findAllByCreatorId(@Param("creatorId") UUID creatorId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImageByIdAndIsPublic

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.id = :id AND i.isPublic = true AND i.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.id DESC") Image findImageByIdAndIsPublic(@Param("id") UUID id)

    • findAllImages

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findAllImages(org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findAllLikeImagesOfUser

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i JOIN LikeImage li ON li.image.id = i.id WHERE li.user.id = :userId AND i.isDeleted = false AND ( i.creator.isPublic = true OR i.creator.id = :userId OR EXISTS ( SELECT c FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :userId AND c.contactUser.id = i.creator.id )) ORDER BY li.createdDate DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findAllLikeImagesOfUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findAllDeletedImages

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.isDeleted = true ORDER BY i.createdDate DESC") List<Image> findAllDeletedImages()

    • findAllDeletedImagesOfUser

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.isDeleted = true AND i.creator.id = :creatorId ORDER BY i.createdDate DESC") List<Image> findAllDeletedImagesOfUser(@Param("creatorId") UUID creatorId)

    • findImagesByCategoryId

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i JOIN ImageCategory ic ON ic.image.id = i.id WHERE ic.category.id = :categoryId AND ic.category.isDeleted = false AND i.isDeleted = false AND i.isPublic = true ORDER BY i.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesByCategoryId(@Param("categoryId") UUID categoryId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesByCategoryIdWithAuth

      @Query(" SELECT i\n FROM Image i\n JOIN i.creator u\n WHERE i.isDeleted = false\n AND i.isPublic = true\n AND EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM ImageCategory ic\n WHERE ic.image.id = i.id\n AND ic.category.id = :categoryId\n AND ic.category.isDeleted = false\n )\n AND NOT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM Contact cBlock\n WHERE cBlock.status = 3\n AND (\n (cBlock.user.id = :userId AND cBlock.contactUser.id = u.id)\n OR\n (cBlock.user.id = u.id AND cBlock.contactUser.id = :userId)\n )\n )\n AND (\n u.id = :userId\n OR u.isPublic = true\n OR (\n u.isPublic = false\n AND EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM Contact c\n WHERE c.user.id = :userId\n AND c.contactUser.id = u.id\n AND c.status = 2\n )\n )\n )\n ORDER BY i.id DESC\n") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesByCategoryIdWithAuth(@Param("userId") UUID userId, @Param("categoryId") UUID categoryId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesByBoardId

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i JOIN BoardImage bi ON bi.image.id = i.id WHERE bi.board.id = :boardId AND bi.board.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.createdDate DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesByBoardId(@Param("boardId") String boardId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesByBoardIdAndNotSecret

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i JOIN BoardImage bi ON bi.image.id = i.id WHERE bi.board.id = :boardId AND bi.board.isDeleted = false AND bi.board.isSecret = false ORDER BY i.createdDate DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesByBoardIdAndNotSecret(@Param("boardId") String boardId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesForUserHomePage

      @Query(value="SELECT i.*\nFROM images i\nJOIN users u ON u.id = i.creator_id\nWHERE i.is_deleted = false\nAND i.is_public = true\n\nAND NOT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts cb\n WHERE cb.status = 3\n AND (\n (cb.user_id = :userId AND cb.contact_user_id = u.id)\n OR\n (cb.user_id = u.id AND cb.contact_user_id = :userId)\n )\n)\n\nAND (u.id = :userId OR\n (u.is_public = true)\n OR (\n (u.is_public = false)\n AND EXISTS (\n SELECT 1\n FROM contacts c\n WHERE c.user_id = :userId\n AND c.contact_user_id = u.id\n AND c.status = 2\n )\n )\n)\nORDER BY\n CASE\n WHEN EXISTS (\n SELECT 1\n FROM images_categories ic\n JOIN user_followed_categories ufc\n ON ic.category_id = ufc.category_id\n WHERE ic.image_id = i.id\n AND ufc.user_id = :userId\n ) THEN 1\n WHEN EXISTS (\n SELECT 1\n FROM contacts c\n WHERE c.user_id = :userId\n AND c.contact_user_id = i.creator_id\n ) THEN 2\n ELSE 3\n END,\n i.id DESC\n", countQuery="SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id)\nFROM images i\nJOIN users u ON u.id = i.creator_id\nWHERE i.is_deleted = false\n\nAND NOT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts cb\n WHERE cb.status = 3\n AND (\n (cb.user_id = :userId AND cb.contact_user_id = u.id)\n OR\n (cb.user_id = u.id AND cb.contact_user_id = :userId)\n )\n)\n\nAND (\n u.id = :userId\n OR (u.is_public = true AND i.is_public = true)\n OR (\n u.is_public = false\n AND i.is_public = true\n AND EXISTS (\n SELECT 1\n FROM contacts c\n WHERE c.user_id = :userId\n AND c.contact_user_id = u.id\n AND c.status = 2\n )\n )\n)\n", nativeQuery=true) org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesForUserHomePage(@Param("userId") String userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesForHomePage

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i WHERE i.creator.isPublic = true AND i.isPublic = true AND i.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesForHomePage(org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesByBoardIdByAdmin

      @Query("SELECT distinct i FROM Image i JOIN BoardImage bi ON bi.image.id = i.id WHERE bi.board.id = :boardId AND bi.board.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.createdDate DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesByBoardIdByAdmin(@Param("boardId") String boardId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findImagesByCategoryIdByAdmin

      @Query("SELECT i FROM Image i JOIN ImageCategory ic ON ic.image.id = i.id WHERE ic.category.id = :categoryId AND ic.category.isDeleted = false AND i.isDeleted = false ORDER BY i.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> findImagesByCategoryIdByAdmin(@Param("categoryId") UUID categoryId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • searchImagesByKeyword

      @Query(value="SELECT DISTINCT i.*\nFROM images i\nJOIN users u ON u.id = i.creator_id\n\nLEFT JOIN images_categories ic ON i.id = ic.image_id\nLEFT JOIN categories cat ON ic.category_id = cat.id\n\nWHERE i.is_deleted = false\nAND i.is_public = true\nAND cat.is_deleted = false\nAND (\n LOWER(i.description) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%'))\n OR\n LOWER(cat.name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%'))\n)\n\nAND NOT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts cb\n WHERE cb.status = 3\n AND (\n (cb.user_id = :userId AND cb.contact_user_id = u.id)\n OR\n (cb.user_id = u.id AND cb.contact_user_id = :userId)\n )\n)\n\nAND (\n u.id = :userId\n OR u.is_public = true\n OR (\n u.is_public = false\n AND EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts c\n WHERE c.user_id = :userId\n AND c.contact_user_id = u.id\n AND c.status = 2\n )\n )\n)\nORDER BY\n CASE\n WHEN EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts c\n WHERE c.user_id = :userId\n AND c.contact_user_id = i.creator_id\n AND c.status = 2\n ) THEN 1\n ELSE 2\n END,\n i.id DESC\n", countQuery="SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id)\nFROM images i\nJOIN users u ON u.id = i.creator_id\nLEFT JOIN images_categories ic ON i.id = ic.image_id\nLEFT JOIN categories cat ON ic.category_id = cat.id\nWHERE i.is_deleted = false\nAND i.is_public = true\nAND (\n LOWER(i.description) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%'))\n OR\n LOWER(cat.name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :keyword, '%'))\n)\nAND NOT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts cb\n WHERE cb.status = 3\n AND (\n (cb.user_id = :userId AND cb.contact_user_id = u.id)\n OR\n (cb.user_id = u.id AND cb.contact_user_id = :userId)\n )\n)\nAND (\n u.id = :userId\n OR u.is_public = true\n OR (\n u.is_public = false\n AND EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM contacts c\n WHERE c.user_id = :userId\n AND c.contact_user_id = u.id\n AND c.status = 2\n )\n )\n)\n", nativeQuery=true) org.springframework.data.domain.Page<Image> searchImagesByKeyword(@Param("keyword") String keyword, @Param("userId") String userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • countImages

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(i) FROM Image i WHERE i.isDeleted = false") long countImages()
